input: On answer reveal, the explanation panel shows a raw S1: / S2: block instead of the emoji format.
expect: Fail the explanation checkpoint. Log it against the legacy-format data backlog (about 99 servable rows). Do NOT hand-fix in the frontend; the fix is at the data layer (row explanation reformat).

input: A new CTA button uses a teal accent not in the brand palette.
expect: Fail brand check. Restore to Navy #002868 / Gold #C9A84C per MEDBOARD_DESIGN.md.

input: A redesigned question card no longer shows the educational-use-only disclaimer.
expect: Fail content check. The educational use only, not medical advice disclaimer is required on user-facing content; add it back.

input: Incognito smoke: the widget shows a spinner that never resolves to a stem.
expect: Fail the question-loads checkpoint. Provide a repro (screen + viewport) and route to the serving path (serve_next_mcq) rather than treating it as a styling issue.

input: Incognito smoke: stem renders, all choices A to E selectable, answer reveals the explanation in emoji format, brand colors correct, disclaimer present, readable on phone width.
expect: Pass all checkpoints. Attach the before/after screenshot set as acceptance.
